reference: Hello, it is entirely a normal phenomenon. You are aware of your heartbeat; it happens only when you are relaxing and your pulse rate is also normal. Therefore, I think it is not a pathological condition at all. You should try to ignore it. However, if it does not get relieved, then you can get 'Ciplar LA' twenty milligrams once a day prescribed by a local doctor for a few weeks.
text: Hello. It is entirely a normal phenomenon. You are aware of your heartbeat. It happens only when you are relaxing and your pulse rate is also normal. Therefore, I think it is not a pathological condition at all. You should try to ignore it. However, if it does not get relieved, then you can get Kipler LA 20 milligrams once a day prescribed by a local doctor for a few weeks.
